raw_consumer_statement:
A credit card issued in my name was stolen from the mail before I received or activated it. Unauthorized charges were made on XX/XX/year>, including a {$9500.00} charge at XXXX and additional transactions in New York. 

I reported this as fraud on XX/XX/XXXX and again on XX/XX/XXXX and was told it had been submitted as fraud, with a reference number provided. However, after more than XXXX days, these charges were still not properly handled as fraud and no timely provisional credit was issued. 

My account currently shows the transactions as disputed rather than fraud, contradicting what I was told. Additionally, a tax refund check issued in my name was stolen from the mail and fraudulently cashed. 

I did not authorize any of these transactions and never had possession of the card. I am requesting immediate reclassification as fraud, full provisional credit, and confirmation I have no liability.
